creator: Andre.Albsmeier@siemens.com
text:
Rev 1.166 of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/multimedia/mplayer/Makefile says

- Split the port into mplayer and mencoder
...

but there is no /usr/ports/multimedia/mencoder although all
data needed to create the mencoder port had been submitted
in maintainer's PR ports/115170.

Fix: 

Commit what maintainer has submitted in PR ports/115170 completely.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/multimedia/mencoder
